item.title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrecoverysoft
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company website www.ddiitt.com is helpful to get user friendly data revive program for retrieval of logically damaged digital pictures and other multimedia files. Simple to handle Files Recovery Software offers advance option to keep safe all retrieved files and folder at any specified location on desktop machine. How to get back removed files from corrupted pen drives? Use best featured file rescue tool to easily undelete memorable video clips, text files and other types of data from formatted USB media.

[read more]

How to get back removed files from corrupted pen drives? Use best featured file rescue tool to easily undelete memorable video clips, text files and other types of data from formatted USB media.

item.title: Digital Picture Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: flashdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Best featured and easy to use Digital Picture Files Recovery Software provides perfect solution to retrieve your memorable moment’s images from variety to storage media by saving time and cost in just few simple mouse clicks. Innovative data restoration software is specifically devised to regain pictures files from corrupted or badly crashed USB flash drive without having any extra technical skills. Digital picture recovery software retrieves and restores deleted, formatted, or corrupted photographs, images, snapshots, and digital stills from fixed and removable media devices. Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

[read more]

Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. Well featured card file salvage program safely recovers files lost due to hardware/software malfunction.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Recovery Software

Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. Well featured card file salvage program safely recovers files lost due to hardware/software malfunction.

Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. Well featured card file salvage program safely recovers files lost due to hardware/software malfunction.

item.title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: flashdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
For downloading Flash Drive Data Recovery program visit following web page www.flashdrivedatarecovery.org which is used for efficient data restoration that is formatted by mistake from handy memory drives. Jump drive data regaining utility recovers erased music files such as mp3, midi, m4a, wav, aac and many more file extensions from formatted key drive in convenient manner without any technical guidance or support. Flash drive data recovery software is designed to recover lost data from major branded USB flash drives, including Pen drive, Thumb drive, Handy drive, and other pen drive storage media. Software is designed to recover corrupted or inaccessible files from virus-infected pen drives, including various file types like doc, ppt, pdf, jpg, gif, wav, mov, mp3, xls, midi, and bmp. Data retrieval software allows users to save recovered files at a specific location on their computer.

[read more]
item.description:

Software is designed to recover corrupted or inaccessible files from virus-infected pen drives, including various file types like doc, ppt, pdf, jpg, gif, wav, mov, mp3, xls, midi, and bmp. Data retrieval software allows users to save recovered files at a specific location on their computer.

Photograph recollecting application facilitates user with advance feature of automatic data recovery for restoring misplaced still images from flash drive and save them at specific location in user computer system automatically. Use perfect Digital Pictures Recovery Software for regaining vanished snapshots in just few minutes conveniently.

item.title: USB Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Repair
(Utilities)
Genuine data salvage utility is designed to provide best solution for recovering accidently damaged files, images from HDD. USB drive salvage software gives opportunity to recover different file extension picture files, music files after damaged due to human mistake, and unexpected system failure etc. www.usbrepair.org allows user to easily retrieve missing industry documents, party snaps etc from various storage media. USB Data rescue tool is design to tackle common errors which cause serious damage and restore it without any interruption from flash drive. Data recovery program is helpful for get back lost or erased information, text documents from commonly used storage media including flash drive, removable media, audio- video players etc. USB repair disk drive application comes with inbuilt GUI interface which is useful for user to understand disk recovery tool for retrieve missing files or folders. Disk drive software supports all brands of storage devices including Transcend, SanDisk, Sony, and Kingston etc to recover lost picture files, damaged document which lost because of improper USB drive removal, virus attack, and accidently deletion from removable disk. Efficient data recovery software is useful for recovering damaged digital picture files lost from memory card and save it in new disk location immediately. USB disk recovery utility has capability to manage restoration of badly damaged document from flash drive within limited time duration. www.usbrepair.org offers to recover accidently deleted data, virus corrupted documents, missing audio video files without any technical knowledge from damaged USB disk drive. Features *Quick recovery of damaged documents by using USB disk drive application and save it in safe disk location. *Provide facility to restore business files which lost due to virus attack, system malfunctioning, improper USB disk removal etc. *Support different storage media including flash drive, removable disk, pen drive, USB drive etc

[read more]
item.description:
USB Repair
(Utilities)
Genuine data salvage utility is designed to provide best solution for recovering accidently damaged files, images from HDD. USB drive salvage software gives opportunity to recover different file extension picture files, music files after damaged due to human mistake, and unexpected system failure etc. www.usbrepair.org allows user to easily retrieve missing industry documents, party snaps etc from various storage media. Efficient data recovery software is useful for recovering damaged digital picture files lost from memory card and save it in new disk location immediately. USB disk recovery utility has capability to manage restoration of badly damaged document from flash drive within limited time duration. www.usbrepair.org offers to recover accidently deleted data, virus corrupted documents, missing audio video files without any technical knowledge from damaged USB disk drive. Features *Quick recovery of damaged documents by using USB disk drive application and save it in safe disk location. *Provide facility to restore business files which lost due to virus attack, system malfunctioning, improper USB disk removal etc. *Support different storage media including flash drive, removable disk, pen drive, USB drive etc

[read more]

Genuine data salvage utility is designed to provide best solution for recovering accidently damaged files, images from HDD. USB drive salvage software gives opportunity to recover different file extension picture files, music files after damaged due to human mistake, and unexpected system failure etc. www.usbrepair.org allows user to easily retrieve missing industry documents, party snaps etc from various storage media. item.title: Okcash [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Okcash [Financial]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Okcash
(Financial)
Your Eco-Friendly, Multi-Chain Digital Currency. Open-source and decentralized, Okcash enables secure, global transactions with no central authority.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: Katvan [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: Katvan [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Katvan
(Text Editors)
A bare-bones editor for Typst files, with a bias for Right-to-Left editing.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
